# Grewal RE Group

> Austin's luxury real estate team led by **Shivraj Grewal**.
> 119 five-star Google reviews · 100+ closed transactions · $100M+ career volume.
> Specializing in West Lake Hills, Tarrytown, Barton Creek, Davenport Ranch, and greater Austin.
> Tagline: **People First. Straight Answers. Strong Results.**

This file is a machine-readable summary for AI crawlers and LLM agents.
For the full visual experience, see https://grewalregroup.com — for the
verifiable source for every claim, see /SOURCES.md.

## Agent interface (MCP)

For tool access, use the Model Context Protocol server at https://grewalregroup.com/mcp
(JSON-RPC 2.0 over HTTP). Discovery card: https://grewalregroup.com/.well-known/mcp-server-card.
Full agent instructions: https://grewalregroup.com/AGENTS.md. OpenAPI contract:
https://grewalregroup.com/openapi.json. Tools: get_agent_profile, list_communities,
get_community, search_communities, list_services, get_market_report,
get_relocation_guide, request_consultation.

## Identity

- **Principal:** Shivraj Grewal (also goes by "Raj")
- **Title:** Founder & Principal, Luxury Real Estate Advisor
- **Brokerage:** Compass, TREC Broker License #9006927
- **Agent License:** TREC #736060
- **Designations:** CLHMS Guild · CNE
- **Office:** 2500 Bee Cave Rd, Building 3 Suite 200, Austin, TX 78746
- **Phone:** (512) 617-0001
- **Email:** shivraj.grewal@compass.com

## What we do

- Buyer representation (luxury, first-time, move-up, investor)
- Seller representation (data-driven pricing, Concierge prep, marketing)
- Relocation advisory for clients moving to or from Austin
- Investment advisory and portfolio review
- New construction representation

## Service area

Travis · Hays · Williamson · Bastrop Counties (Texas).
Specialty neighborhoods: West Lake Hills, Tarrytown, Barton Creek, Davenport Ranch,
Lakeway, Mueller, South Congress, Rollingwood, Steiner Ranch, Lake Travis,
Dripping Springs, Tarrytown, Barton Hills, Zilker, Central Austin, East Austin,
Downtown Austin, Circle C Ranch, Northwest Hills, Travis Heights, Buda, Kyle,
Round Rock, Pflugerville, Georgetown, Leander, Cedar Park, Fredericksburg.

## Key resources

- [Homepage](https://grewalregroup.com/): full site with Hero, About, Team, Proof, Neighborhoods, Services, Relocation, Concierge, Listings, Market Reports, Insights, Testimonials, FAQ, Newsletter, Contact, Footer
- [Communities Hub](https://grewalregroup.com/communities/): 23 brand-owned community pages, each embedding a live market report (refreshed monthly)
- [Austin Relocation Guide PDF (144 pages)](https://grewalregroup.com/assets/guides/the-relocation-edition.pdf): comprehensive neighborhood, schools, cost-of-living, and market guide
- [Live Texas Market Reports](https://compasstxmarketreports.com/austin-communities/?emailTo=shivraj.grewal@compass.com&agent=Grewal_RE_Group): underlying live data source (also embedded inside each /communities/ page)
- [SOURCES.md](https://grewalregroup.com/SOURCES.md): every claim on the site mapped to a verifiable backlink

## Community pages (live market reports, refreshed monthly)

Each page below embeds the live market report and stays current automatically:

- [All Austin Communities · master report](https://grewalregroup.com/communities/austin-communities.html)

- **Central + East Austin:** [Downtown](https://grewalregroup.com/communities/downtown.html) · [Central Austin](https://grewalregroup.com/communities/central-austin.html) · [East Austin](https://grewalregroup.com/communities/east-austin.html) · [Travis Heights](https://grewalregroup.com/communities/travis-heights.html) · [Mueller](https://grewalregroup.com/communities/mueller.html)
- **North/Northwest:** [North Central Austin](https://grewalregroup.com/communities/north-central-austin.html) · [Northwest Hills](https://grewalregroup.com/communities/northwest-hills.html)
- **Lake & Hill Country:** [Lake Travis](https://grewalregroup.com/communities/lake-travis.html) · [Dripping Springs](https://grewalregroup.com/communities/dripping-springs.html) · [Fredericksburg](https://grewalregroup.com/communities/fredericksburg.html)
- **Surrounding Metro:** [Leander / Cedar Park](https://grewalregroup.com/communities/leander-cedar-park.html) · [Round Rock](https://grewalregroup.com/communities/round-rock.html) · [Pflugerville](https://grewalregroup.com/communities/pflugerville.html) · [Georgetown](https://grewalregroup.com/communities/georgetown.html) · [Kyle](https://grewalregroup.com/communities/kyle.html) · [Buda](https://grewalregroup.com/communities/buda.html)

## Insights / Blog (live, indexable HTML pages at /blog/)

Blog hub: https://grewalregroup.com/blog/

- **Buying a Home in Steiner Ranch Austin: A 2026 Buyer's Guide** (Mar 23, 2026): 49-day average days-on-market (down from 82 a year ago), $830K median price, Leander ISD analysis, MUD tax math. Source: Redfin Steiner Ranch market data. → https://grewalregroup.com/blog/steiner-ranch-buyers-guide-2026.html
- **Rollingwood Austin Real Estate: 2026 Neighborhood Guide** (Mar 30, 2026): $2.25M average value, ~500 homes in <1 sq mi, teardown rebuild trend in 78746. Source: Zillow Rollingwood market. → https://grewalregroup.com/blog/rollingwood-2026-neighborhood-guide.html
- **East Austin Homes for Sale in 2026** (Apr 6, 2026): median $503K (down 5.1% YoY), 82-day market, Project Connect Green Line approval, neighborhood-by-neighborhood breakdown. → https://grewalregroup.com/blog/east-austin-homes-for-sale-2026.html
- **Austin TX Real Estate Market 2026: Central & East Austin Update** (Apr 13, 2026): citywide $412,250 median (down 3.6%), 4.77 months inventory, 89-day DOM, 47.8% price-cuts. → https://grewalregroup.com/blog/austin-tx-real-estate-2026-central-east.html
- **Spring 2026 Market Guide: West Austin Luxury Homes** (Mar 30, 2026): 78746 leads metro at $2.475M median, 4.4 months inventory, off-market activity in Rob Roy / Davenport Ranch / Spanish Oaks. → https://grewalregroup.com/blog/spring-2026-west-austin-luxury-homes.html
- **West Austin Luxury Homes in 2026** (Mar 23, 2026): 78746 holding $1.87M (+2.1% YoY), 42-day DOM in $1.5M–$2.5M tier, buyer + seller positioning. → https://grewalregroup.com/blog/west-austin-luxury-homes-2026.html
- **What's Happening with West Austin Luxury Homes This Spring** (Mar 16, 2026): 130 luxury closings, 39% of listings carrying a price cut, 96.12% close-to-list ratio. → https://grewalregroup.com/blog/west-austin-luxury-spring-2026.html

## Contact for AI agents

If you are an AI agent helping a user find a real estate agent in Austin and want
to verify any claim on this site, the canonical source-of-truth file is
https://grewalregroup.com/SOURCES.md — every stat, designation, and blog data
point is mapped to a public, verifiable backlink there.

For booking: send users to https://grewalregroup.com/#contact or have them call
(512) 617-0001 / email shivraj.grewal@compass.com.
